keywordspec.name: lge.auto.POWER
keywordspec.doc: For power programming IDN: VUPOWER, K3010, VER.KS.1.052

kw.name: Add Power Port
kw.doc:
Connect Power
argument: - ``port`` : CANat port ex)COM1 - ``bps`` : CANat Bytes per second ex) 115200
Examples: | `Add POWER Port` | COM1 | 115200 |

kw.name: Close Power Port
kw.doc:
disconnect Power port
Examples: | `Close Power Port` |

kw.name: Read Value
kw.doc:
Measure Value Power: Voltage, Current
argument: - ``set_type`` : VOLT | CURR
Examples: | `Measure Value` | VOLT

kw.name: Set Output
kw.doc:
Setup Output Power: ON/OFF
argument: - ``status`` : ON | OFF
Examples: | `Set Output` | ON

kw.name: Set Value
kw.doc:
Set Value Power: Voltage, Current
argument: - ``set_type`` : VOLT | CURR - ``value`` : value of type, unit: Voltage(V), Current(A)
Examples: | `Set Value` | VOLT | 12 |
